title: China's Moonshot AI stole from Anthropic, Trump tech adviser says
description: The allegations come as Chinese AI companies are facing increased US government scrutiny.
content:
A White House adviser has accused China's Moonshot AI of a "large scale" effort to steal the capabilities of top US artificial intelligence (AI) models.

title: 'Row over early prison release' and 'Gary's back of the net tax'
description: A number of the papers are focusing on a review of the early prison release programme.

title: Multiple sclerosis: First drug to help patients walk now on NHS in England
description: Fampridine boosts nerve signals to make it easier to walk, with up to 5,000 eligible.
content:
The first drug to help people with multiple sclerosis walk is being made available on the NHS in England.
Fampridine boosts nerve signals to make it easier for some people to move and live independently.
Aysen Slack, who used to pay for fampridine pr... [2502 chars]

title: UK weather: When will it rain next?
description: Following weeks of mainly dry weather, we can welcome some rain this weekend, but it is not going to be that much, as Chris Fawkes explains.
content:
If you cannot remember the last time it rained, you are probably not alone.
June was actually wetter than average in the UK, which might come as a surprise given our recent run of weather, but for England and Wales the majority of that rain came down... [1702 chars]

title: Airport drop-off fees up by a third - here are the priciest
description: The cost of parking closest to the terminal has hit £10 at two of the UK's airports.
content:
Drop-off fees at the UK's major airports have risen by a third on average since last summer, new analysis has found.
The RAC motoring group looked at the cost of pulling up to the closest point to terminals at the 20 busiest airports, 16 of which had... [2010 chars]
